title: American Nutella Casserole
description: A sweet and gooey American-inspired casserole using Nutella and dense ingredients.
instructions: 2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the Nutella, dense cake mix, and vanilla extract. Mix until well combined.
3. Add the sliced American butter and mix until the batter is smooth.
4. Pour the batter into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Top with marshmallows and bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
